message:
fix(replication): reject unauthenticated packets when receiver has auth key

The verify_integrity() match on (None, _) => true accepted packets with
no auth tag even when the receiver had an auth key configured, bypassing
authentication. Split into explicit (None, Some(_)) => false to reject
unauthenticated packets and (None, None) => true for the no-auth case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
